working_on.task: Publish Forge 2.14.3 as the stable release after the six-skill wording and emphasis hardening pass

verification: pytest packages/forge-core/tests/test_contracts.py -q -> PASS on 2026-04-22 after the six-skill wording hardening pass
python scripts/verify_repo.py -> PASS on 2026-04-22 after 2.14.3 release sync
decisions_made: Forge wording hardening should target six medium-leverage workflow skills instead of sweeping the entire skill set.
The hardening pass should increase scanability and coercion with selective emphasis while preserving Forge's contract-first tone.
Release-facing docs and continuity artifacts must track 2.14.3 as the current stable line.
risks: A later pass may still need to align the surface tone of subagent-driven-development and receiving-code-review with the hardened six-skill set.
